title: Is it possible to assign different roles to the people within the task? (Owner / Assignee / Watcher)
excerpt:
Hello, I used JIRA in my past and now trying Monday. 
In JIRA I was able to assign different roles to the people in the task, namely: Owner, Assignee and Watcher. 
Is there something similar in Monday? 
Thank you!

posts.author: svetaoksen (Svetlana Oksen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I used JIRA in my past and now trying Monday.

In JIRA I was able to assign different roles to the people in the task, namely: Owner, Assignee and Watcher.
Is there something similar in Monday?

Thank you!

posts.author: Bill_In_Ohio (Bill Duncan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning, I am new to monday was well, coming from Jira and Asana.
Yes, I have found that you can use the People field to have multiple people assigned to a task. If the aren’t monday users, it is a little more difficult, as I had to create an employee board, connect the boards, and then have fields for each of the roles, but it can still be done.
